rationale: The two `forall|p: Pcid|` (and `forall|i: IOid|`) ensures have disjoint triggers between the post1_self_ and post2_self_ runs, so z3 never instantiates them on the same skolem. Each `assert forall ... by {}` introduces a fused trigger mentioning both runs, forcing pointwise equality; the case-split on `*_active` combined with `wf`'s `*_active(x) <==> *_to_proc_ptr@[x as int].is_Some()` then lifts this to `=~=` seq-view equality on the option-arrays.
